formation-allemande-2c: Allemande for 2 couples is the standard 2-couple allemande entry; token ALLMND;2C;.
formation-allemande-turn: Use Allemande Turn (to R or L) for the turn variant; token ALL_RL.
bars-skip-change-stephen: Bill's Friend, Stephen explicitly says first couple use skip change on bars 11-12 and again on 15-16.
bars-pas-de-basque-discounted-suit: Discounted Suit, The explicitly names pas de basque on bars 17-18.
bars-travelling-step-kirkcudbright: Dancing in Kirkcudbright names a travelling step left for the bar-4 pivot.
bars-setting-step-circle-strathspey: Circle Strathspey bars 1-8 use Glasgow Highlanders setting step.
bars-mairis-wedding-pass-lsh: Mairi's Wedding says first couple pass partner left shoulder in bars 9-24.
bars-reel51-cast-two-places: The Reel of the 51st Division says first couple cast off two places in bars 1-8.
bars-montgomeries-cross-lh: Montgomeries' Rant, The says first couple cross left hand after the opening right-hand cross in bars 1-8.
bars-diplomat-setting-steps: The Diplomat says first couple use two setting steps as they pass left shoulder.
manual-skip-change-quote:
Manual section 5.4.1 (Skip change of step, page 74): 5.4.1  Skip change of step 
This step is used to travel. One skip change of step takes one bar of music. 
1. 
Hop on the left foot and, at the same time, fully extend the right 
leg forward. 
2. 
With the right leg fully extended in fourth in front of third 
position, step forward onto the right foot. 
3. 
Bring the left foot behind the right foot to third rear position. 
4. 
Step forward again with the right foot into fourth in front of third 
position. 
Rhythmic words: Hop, step, close, step (or similar rhythmic variations). 
The rhythm of jig time is particularly suitable for the practice o
manual-absent-term-abstain: That term is not in the manual: there is no section for it, so I cannot quote any wording.
